name: Wassail Cider
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 can (6 oz) frozen lemon juice concentrate
1 1/4 can (6 oz) frozen orange juice concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the apple cider into a large pot.
2. Add the brown sugar, lemon juice concentrate, and orange juice concentrate.
3. Tie the whole cloves and allspice together in cheesecloth.
4. Add the spice bundle to the pot with the cider mixture.
5. Stir in the ground nutmeg.
6. Cover the pot and bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat.
7. Simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Remove the cheesecloth spice bundle from the pot.
9. Pour the wassail into serving mugs.
10. Add a cinnamon stick to each mug before serving.
Makes 24 servings of approximately 6 ounces each.
